root_text.sn51.16:1.1: “Ye hi keci, bhikkhave, atītamaddhānaṁ samaṇā vā brāhmaṇā vā mahiddhikā ahesuṁ mahānubhāvā, sabbe te catunnaṁ iddhipādānaṁ bhāvitattā bahulīkatattā.
root_text.sn51.16:1.2: Ye hi keci, bhikkhave, anāgatamaddhānaṁ samaṇā vā brāhmaṇā vā mahiddhikā bhavissanti mahānubhāvā, sabbe te catunnaṁ iddhipādānaṁ bhāvitattā bahulīkatattā.
root_text.sn51.16:1.3: Ye hi keci, bhikkhave, etarahi samaṇā vā brāhmaṇā vā mahiddhikā mahānubhāvā, sabbe te catunnaṁ iddhipādānaṁ bhāvitattā bahulīkatattā.
root_text.sn51.16:2.2: Idha, bhikkhave, bhikkhu chandasamādhippadhānasaṅkhārasamannāgataṁ iddhipādaṁ bhāveti,
root_text.sn51.16:2.6: Ye hi keci, bhikkhave, atītamaddhānaṁ samaṇā vā brāhmaṇā vā mahiddhikā ahesuṁ mahānubhāvā, sabbe te imesaṁyeva catunnaṁ iddhipādānaṁ bhāvitattā bahulīkatattā.
root_text.sn51.16:2.7: Ye hi keci, bhikkhave, anāgatamaddhānaṁ samaṇā vā brāhmaṇā vā mahiddhikā bhavissanti mahānubhāvā, sabbe te imesaṁyeva catunnaṁ iddhipādānaṁ bhāvitattā bahulīkatattā.
root_text.sn51.16:2.8: Ye hi keci, bhikkhave, etarahi samaṇā vā brāhmaṇā vā mahiddhikā mahānubhāvā, sabbe te imesaṁyeva catunnaṁ iddhipādānaṁ bhāvitattā bahulīkatattā”ti.

translation_text.sn51.16:1.1: “Mendicants, all the ascetics and brahmins in the past,
translation_text.sn51.16:1.3: or present who are mighty and powerful have become so by developing and cultivating the four bases of psychic power.
translation_text.sn51.16:2.2: It’s when a mendicant develops the basis of psychic power that has immersion due to enthusiasm …
translation_text.sn51.16:2.6: All the ascetics and brahmins in the past,
translation_text.sn51.16:2.8: or present who are mighty and powerful have become so by developing and cultivating the four bases of psychic power.”
